TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_banday
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: e yau usiq a sunis maded.
S.PHON: ə jau usiq a sunis maɮəɮ.
S.FORM: e yau usiq a sunis maded.
S.PHON: ə jau usiq a sunis maɮəɮ.
S.TRANSL: There is a child who is sitting.

S.FORM: ta ngayauanna wasu ti titu ngid nanum.
S.PHON: ta ŋajauanna wasu ti titu ŋiɮ nanum.
S.FORM: ta ngayauanna wasu ti titu ngid nanum.
S.PHON: ta ŋajauanna wasu ti titu ŋiɮ nanum.
S.TRANSL: In front of him, a dog wants to drink water.
The child is sleeping in the room.
He takes care of a frog.

S.FORM: nyana smani kasianeman na sunis maynep taqaynepan.
S.PHON: njana smani kasianəman na sunis majnəp taqajnəpan.
S.FORM: nyana smani kasianeman na sunis maynep taqaynepan.
S.PHON: njana smani kasianəman na sunis majnəp taqajnəpan.
S.TRANSL: 不知道在房間睡覺的小孩想什麼?
What is the child who is sleeping in the room thinking about?

S.FORM: yau tangayauanna ya usiq a zpu.
S.PHON: jau taŋajauanna ja usiq a z~rpu.
S.FORM: yau tangayauanna ya usiq a zpu.
S.PHON: jau taŋajauanna ja usiq a z~rpu.
S.TRANSL: In front of him are a pair of shoes.

S.FORM: yau mawRat a Ru tu wasu.
S.PHON: jau mawʁat a ʁu tu wasu.
S.FORM: yau mawRat a Ru tu wasu.
S.PHON: jau mawʁat a ʁu tu wasu.

S.FORM: sunis 'nay Runanay nani mawRat tu qawRat tu ninu.
S.PHON: sunis ʔnaj ʁunanaj nani mawʁat tu qawʁat tu ninu.
S.FORM: sunis 'nay Runanay nani mawRat tu qawRat tu ninu.
S.PHON: sunis ʔnaj ʁunanaj nani mawʁat tu qawʁat tu ninu.

S.FORM: maRaw tu ta Rwa tatian nani.
S.PHON: maʁaw tu ta ʁwa tatian nani.
S.FORM: maRaw tu ta Rwa tatian nani.
S.PHON: maʁaw tu ta ʁwa tatian nani.

S.FORM: ni yau takinilanna ya titu 'nay qmeRas.
S.PHON: ni jau takiniranna ja titu ʔnaj qməʁas.
S.FORM: ni yau takinilanna ya titu 'nay qmeRas.
S.PHON: ni jau takiniranna ja titu ʔnaj qməʁas.
taɮəŋatan pasa tati tmajta sunis ʔnaj.
taɮəŋatan pasa tati tmajta sunis ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: The child is looking outwards from the window.

S.FORM: en qmapaR XXXX sunis tu ti tu wasu ya Runanay 'nay.
S.PHON: ən qmapaʁ **** sunis tu ti tu wasu ja ʁunanaj ʔnaj.
S.FORM: en qmapaR XXXX sunis tu ti tu wasu ya Runanay 'nay.
S.PHON: ən qmapaʁ **** sunis tu ti tu wasu ja ʁunanaj ʔnaj.

S.FORM: tawian ta tapaRinan kaytaay maded a sunis nani.
S.PHON: tawian ta tapaʁinan kajtaaj maɮəɮ a sunis nani.
S.FORM: tawian ta tapaRinan kaytaay maded a sunis nani.
S.PHON: tawian ta tapaʁinan kajtaaj maɮəɮ a sunis nani.

TRANSL.notes: The child sits on the tree (branch).

S.TRANSL: The child sits on the tree .

S.FORM: mana mani muRing ya sunis 'nay nani.
S.PHON: mana mani muʁiŋ ja sunis ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: mana mani muRing ya sunis 'nay nani.
S.PHON: mana mani muʁiŋ ja sunis ʔnaj nani.

S.TRANSL: The child is on top of the tree.

S.FORM: yauti tabuRangan na qmRas a sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: jauti taβuʁaŋan na qmʁas a sunis ʔnaj.
S.FORM: yauti tabuRangan na qmRas a sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: jauti taβuʁaŋan na qmʁas a sunis ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: By the rock, the child shouted.
There is a turtle under the rock.

S.FORM: takinilan 'nay nani tabuRangan 'nay mzukat a siRmuq.
S.PHON: takiniran ʔnaj nani taβuʁaŋan ʔnaj mz~rukat a siʁmuq.
S.FORM: takinilan 'nay nani tabuRangan 'nay mzukat a siRmuq.
S.PHON: takiniran ʔnaj nani taβuʁaŋan ʔnaj mz~rukat a siʁmuq.
S.TRANSL: 在石頭旁邊跑出一隻鹿來.
Beside the rock, a deer ran out.

S.PHON: nani tmiβuqti ja sunis ʔnaj nani.
nani tmiβuqti ja sunis ʔnaj nani.

S.FORM: tmayta ya siRmuq 'nay tu sunis nani ngidti qatibuq.
S.PHON: tmajta ja siʁmuq ʔnaj tu sunis nani ŋiɮti qatiβuq.
S.FORM: tmayta ya siRmuq 'nay tu sunis nani ngidti qatibuq.
S.PHON: tmajta ja siʁmuq ʔnaj tu sunis nani ŋiɮti qatiβuq.
S.TRANSL: 鹿看小孩掉下去,自己也差一點掉下去.
The deer saw the child fall down, and it almost fell.

S.FORM: talibengna yau usiq a wasu mlana.
S.PHON: tariβəŋna jau usiq a wasu mrana.
S.FORM: talibengna yau usiq a wasu mlana.
S.PHON: tariβəŋna jau usiq a wasu mrana.

S.TRANSL: The person fell into the water.

S.FORM: nani yau tababaw a siRmuq tmayta mlinamawti ya sunis 'nay nani.
S.PHON: nani jau taβaβaw a siʁmuq tmajta mrinamawti ja sunis ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: nani yau tababaw a siRmuq tmayta mlinamawti ya sunis 'nay nani.
S.PHON: nani jau taβaβaw a siʁmuq tmajta mrinamawti ja sunis ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 鹿從上面看那小孩浮出水面.
The deer saw the child floating on the water.

S.FORM: yau a wasu tababawan na sunis.
S.PHON: jau a wasu taβaβawan na sunis.
S.FORM: yau a wasu tababawan na sunis.
S.PHON: jau a wasu taβaβawan na sunis.
S.TRANSL: The dog is on the child.
The child sits on the big wood.

S.FORM: yauti ya wasu masulun tu wasu 'nay ta paRinan buRang ya mawRat.
S.PHON: jauti ja wasu masurun tu wasu ʔnaj ta paʁinan βuʁaŋ ja mawʁat.
S.FORM: yauti ya wasu masulun tu wasu 'nay ta paRinan buRang ya mawRat.
S.PHON: jauti ja wasu masurun tu wasu ʔnaj ta paʁinan βuʁaŋ ja mawʁat.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗和另一隻狗在木頭那裡玩.
The dog plays with another dog around the wood.
小孩和狗在木頭那裡玩.
The child plays with the dog around the wood.

S.FORM: mlizaq mawRat maded tapaRinan madedti ka ya wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: mriz~raq mawʁat maɮəɮ tapaʁinan maɮəɮti ka ja wasu ʔnaj.
S.FORM: mlizaq mawRat maded tapaRinan madedti ka ya wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: mriz~raq mawʁat maɮəɮ tapaʁinan maɮəɮti ka ja wasu ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 喜歡玩就坐下來,狗也坐在木頭那邊.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) liked to play so (he) sat down. The dog also sat by the wood.

S.TRANSL: liked to play so sat down. The dog also sat by the wood.
之前玩的時候小孩很高興.
He enjoyed the time when he played.

S.FORM: ya mzukatti ya iRem tawian ta ngayauan na sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: ja mz~rukatti ja iʁəm tawian ta ŋajauan na sunis ʔnaj.
S.FORM: ya mzukatti ya iRem tawian ta ngayauan na sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: ja mz~rukatti ja iʁəm tawian ta ŋajauan na sunis ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 穿山甲跑出來,到小孩前面.
A pangolin comes out in front of the child.
